subcodes.first_line: O thou my beloved daughter Thy letter was received. Its perusal indicated thy faith and firmness in the Covenant and the Testament.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز من نامه شما رسید و از قرائتش ایمان و استقامت بر عهد و پیمان مفهوم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
